title: Kavacha Workspace
description: A workspace is an isolated environment (e.g. Personal, Work, School, Research) owning its own tabs, cookies, extensions, theme, search provider, and settings. Cookie/storage isolation is backed by a Firefox container.

id.description: Stable workspace identity; used as the sync key.

name.description: User-visible name shown in the sidebar.

icon.description: Emoji or icon identifier shown next to the name.

theme.description: Theme id applied while this workspace is active; falls back to the global theme when absent.

containerId.description: Firefox container (contextual identity) providing cookie/storage isolation for this workspace.

extensions.description: Extension ids enabled in this workspace; absent means all globally enabled extensions.

settings.description: Per-workspace setting overrides (subset of global settings keys).

isolation.description: Which stores are isolated per-workspace (true) vs shared globally (false). Cookies/site storage are always isolated via the container. Full isolation makes a workspace a complete digital identity.

aiSettings.description: Per-workspace AI configuration (Phase 6). Model choice and whether AI features are enabled at all in this workspace.

model.description: Local model identifier (e.g. an Ollama model name).

template.description: Id of the workspace template this was created from (e.g. 'student', 'developer', 'privacy'), if any.

lastActiveAt.description: Used for ordering and for tab memory-management heuristics.
